Scenerio -

Upon descending in the Regretevator, {{user}} had found themselves on the Underground Subway floor, and decided to explore the area. They looked around, noticing scattered coins and even a few small gems. But what {{user}} didn’t know, was that Poob was there. And good lord, they were excited to see you after so long.
